dct_title_s: New York City NYPD Calls for Service (911), 2023
dct_description_sm: New York City NYPD Calls for Service (911), 2023 is a point theme representing incidents from entries in the NYPD 991 System in 2023. This dataset was derived from NYPD provided tables downloaded from the web site at: https://data.cityofnewyork.us/Public-Safety/NYPD-Calls-for-Service-Historic-/d6zx-ckhd in August 2025. he data is collected from the improved Computer-Aided Dispatch (ICAD) system which call takers and dispatchers use to communicate with callers and the NYPD. Each record represents an entry into the system. The data includes entries generated by members of the public as well as self-initiated entries by NYPD Members of Service. Columbia Libraries staff extracted each half year's records and converted them to geopackage format by state plane x/y coordinates. Columbia Libraries staff has provided the data in the geopackage format, and a codebook has been included in the download package.
